---
title: "Cross-Tool UJC Overlap Upset Plots"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.align="center"}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, results='hide', fig.pos = "h", fig.align = "center")

library(grid)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(RColorConesa)

r_source_dir <- if (dir.exists("R")) "R" else "src/plotting/R"

source(file.path(r_source_dir, "01_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "03_plot_functions.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "04_data_loading.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "05_assembly_functions.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "08_cross_tool_upset.R"))
```


```{r check-paths}
check_paths(src_dirs)
```


```{r load-and-process}
all_results <- list()

for (platform in names(src_dirs)) {
  all_results[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(src_dirs[[platform]])) {
    all_results[[platform]][[method]] <- list()
    cat(platform, method, "\n")
    src_dir <- src_dirs[[platform]][[method]]
    paths <- get_paths(src_dir)

    df_lists <- load_df_lists(paths)

    for (fl_filter_level in fl_filter_levels) {
      results <- process_and_plot(
        df_lists$Bclass_df_list, df_lists$Kclass_df_list,
        technology = platform, fl_threshold = fl_filter_level
      )
      all_results[[platform]][[method]][[as.character(fl_filter_level)]] <- results
    }
  }
}
```


```{r brain-cross-tool-upset, fig.width=18, fig.height=16}
if (!dir.exists("plot_creation")) {
  dir.create("plot_creation")
}

isoseq_brain_upset <- create_cross_tool_upset(all_results, "IsoSeq", "brain")
ont_brain_upset    <- create_cross_tool_upset(all_results, "ONT",    "brain")

brain_cross_tool_figure <- assemble_cross_tool_figure(
  isoseq_brain_upset, ont_brain_upset,
  title = "Cross-tool UJC overlap; brain"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/brain_cross_tool_upset.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = brain_cross_tool_figure,
       width = 18, height = 16, unit = "in")

brain_cross_tool_figure
```


```{r kidney-cross-tool-upset, fig.width=18, fig.height=16}
isoseq_kidney_upset <- create_cross_tool_upset(all_results, "IsoSeq", "kidney")
ont_kidney_upset    <- create_cross_tool_upset(all_results, "ONT",    "kidney")

kidney_cross_tool_figure <- assemble_cross_tool_figure(
  isoseq_kidney_upset, ont_kidney_upset,
  title = "Cross-tool UJC overlap; kidney"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/kidney_cross_tool_upset.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = kidney_cross_tool_figure,
       width = 18, height = 16, unit = "in")

kidney_cross_tool_figure
```


```{r brain-cross-tool-bar, fig.width=14, fig.height=8}
isoseq_brain_bar <- create_cross_tool_bar(all_results, "IsoSeq", "brain")
ont_brain_bar    <- create_cross_tool_bar(all_results, "ONT",    "brain")

brain_cross_tool_bar_figure <- assemble_cross_tool_bar_figure(
  isoseq_brain_bar, ont_brain_bar,
  title = "UJCs by number of detecting tools; brain"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/brain_cross_tool_bar.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = brain_cross_tool_bar_figure,
       width = 14, height = 8, unit = "in")

brain_cross_tool_bar_figure
```


```{r kidney-cross-tool-bar, fig.width=14, fig.height=8}
isoseq_kidney_bar <- create_cross_tool_bar(all_results, "IsoSeq", "kidney")
ont_kidney_bar    <- create_cross_tool_bar(all_results, "ONT",    "kidney")

kidney_cross_tool_bar_figure <- assemble_cross_tool_bar_figure(
  isoseq_kidney_bar, ont_kidney_bar,
  title = "UJCs by number of detecting tools; kidney"
)

ggsave("plot_creation/kidney_cross_tool_bar.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf, plot = kidney_cross_tool_bar_figure,
       width = 14, height = 8, unit = "in")

kidney_cross_tool_bar_figure
```
